productDisplayName: Scullers Men Green & Navy Blue Striped T-shirt
description: Style Notescullers is a celebration of life at its fullest, most unusual and least expected. Scullers is for those who take life on with self-assurance and soul. A polo neck tee with green, navy blue and white stripes is brought to you by Scullers. The logo on the left chest adds to its authentic styling -casual wear made better!Product DescriptionScullers T-shirt striped with white, green and navy blue, has a spread collar, two button placket, short sleeved with vents at hem and ribbed cuffs.Material and Care 100%  CottonDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or low dry in shadeLow iron inside outSizeRelaxed FitThe model ( height 6' and shoulders 18") is size M
